title: lithocarpus elaeagnifolius
intro: Lithocarpus elaeagnifolius, also known as the Lithocarpus tree, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, Fagaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus elaeagnifolius include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and improving respiratory problems. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
